audit_metadata.audit_scope: STUBS, INACCURATE, OUTDATED, INCOMPLETE, METADATA, PEDAGOGY

findings.description: MVI example code uses SwipeRefresh composable which is deprecated in modern Compose Material. The SwipeRefresh component from accompanist is deprecated in favor of PullRefresh from Compose Material3.
findings.suggested_fix: Update example to use PullRefresh from androidx.compose.material3:pullrefresh or add a note about version compatibility

findings.description: Koin example code uses `KoinPlatform.getKoin()` which may not be the recommended approach in Koin 4.0. The Swift interop helper pattern shown is valid but should reference current Koin Multiplatform documentation.
findings.suggested_fix: Verify against Koin 4.0 documentation and update if needed. Consider adding KoinContext helper pattern instead.

findings.description: Koin test example uses `verify()` function from koin-test which may have changed in newer versions. The testing DSL has evolved.
findings.suggested_fix: Update to use current Koin 4.0 testing API with proper imports and verify syntax

findings.description: Koin annotations solution uses @Single and @Factory annotations but doesn't show required koin-compiler plugin configuration or the gradle setup needed for KSP. Without this context, learners won't be able to make annotations work.
findings.suggested_fix: Add content explaining the required KSP plugin configuration and gradle setup for Koin annotations to function

findings.description: Platform-specific example uses NSNumber which requires proper Kotlin/Native Foundation import. The code snippet lacks import statements and may not compile as shown.
findings.suggested_fix: Add required imports (platform.Foundation.NSNumber) and clarify the Kotlin/Native interop requirements

findings.description: MockK usage examples show `mock<T> { }` and `everySuspend { }` patterns but don't mention MockK's KMP support limitations or version requirements. MockK's KMP support is still evolving.
findings.suggested_fix: Add warning about MockK's experimental KMP support and suggest alternatives like manual fakes for production KMP projects

findings.description: CI workflow solution is stored in a .kt file but contains YAML content. This is technically incorrect - the solution should be a YAML file or the challenge should accept the mixed content appropriately.
findings.suggested_fix: Rename solution file to .yml extension or adjust challenge type to properly handle YAML workflow solutions

findings.description: UI testing lesson references Compose Test API (createComposeRule, onNodeWithText) but doesn't show the required test dependency setup in build.gradle.kts. Learners cannot run the tests without knowing the dependencies.
findings.suggested_fix: Add gradle dependency configuration block showing required testing dependencies for Compose Multiplatform

findings.description: Navigation patterns lesson mentions type-safe navigation but doesn't provide concrete examples of how to implement type-safe navigation with Voyager or other KMP navigation libraries.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a concrete example showing type-safe navigation implementation with sealed classes and Voyager Screen types

findings.description: DI analogy (coffee shop) is present but the lesson transitions too quickly from analogy to code without clearly mapping analogy elements to DI concepts.
findings.suggested_fix: Add explicit mapping section showing: Barista -> Dependency Provider, Coffee Machine -> Service, Customer -> Client/Consumer

findings.description: Challenge validation rules check for specific file structure but the hints don't clearly indicate what the learner needs to identify in the messy code.
findings.suggested_fix: Add clearer hints about specific architectural violations to look for (tight coupling, UI logic in database, etc.)

findings.description: Architecture in practice example uses generic ViewModel without specifying lifecycle dependencies. The KMP ViewModel shown assumes commonMain implementation but doesn't clarify platform lifecycle integration.
findings.suggested_fix: Clarify that the ViewModel requires lifecycle-viewmodel-compose dependency and show platform-specific lifecycle integration

findings.description: Koin scope example shows session management but doesn't demonstrate proper scope closing when session ends, which can lead to memory leaks.
findings.suggested_fix: Add example showing `scope.close()` when user logs out or session expires

findings.description: Test solution uses kotlin.test but doesn't include the import statement. This could confuse learners about which test framework is being used.
findings.suggested_fix: Add import kotlin.test.* at the top of the solution file for clarity

findings.description: Turbine example doesn't show the required dependency import or gradle setup. Learners won't know how to add Turbine to their project.
findings.suggested_fix: Add gradle dependency snippet for Turbine library and import statement for app.cash.turbine.test

findings.description: Koin test example uses `stopKoin()` at the end but doesn't show proper test rule/class setup that would handle this automatically. This pattern can cause test isolation issues.
findings.suggested_fix: Recommend using `@After` or AutoCloseKoinTest class pattern instead of manual stopKoin()
